info.title: devngn.ai Wellness API
info.description: Opt-in dev wellness service: profiles, goals, equipment, schedule gaps, and short activity prompts.

get.summary: Returns the user's accepted consent (if any) and the current canonical text.

post.summary: Idempotently accepts the named consent version using the server's canonical text.

delete.summary: Revokes consent and cascade-deletes profile, goals, and equipment.
